descriptionKey.english: When played other spells in hand gain +[effect0.upgrade.trigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage] [magicpower] permanently. [consume]: Double the effect.
descriptionKey.french: Quand cette carte est jouée, les autres sorts dans votre main gagnent +[effect0.upgrade.trigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage] [magicpower] définitivement. <nobr>[consume] :</nobr> l'effet est doublé.
descriptionKey.german: Andere Zauber in der Hand erhalten nach dem Ausspielen +[effect0.upgrade.trigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage] [magicpower] permanent. [consume]: Verdopple den Effekt.
descriptionKey.russian: При розыгрыше других чар из руки навсегда дается [magicpower] х[effect0.upgrade.trigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage]. [consume] удваивает эффект.
descriptionKey.portuguese: Quando jogada, outros feitiços na mão ganham +[effect0.upgrade.trigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage] de [magicpower] permanentemente. [consume]: dobra o efeito.
descriptionKey.chinese: 打出时，手牌中的其他法术永久获得 +[effect0.upgrade.trigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage] [magicpower]。[consume]：使效果加倍。
descriptionKey.spanish: Al jugarla, los demás hechizos de la mano añaden +[effect0.upgrade.trigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage] [magicpower] permanentemente. [consume]: Duplica el efecto.
descriptionKey.chinese_traditional: 打出時，手牌中其他法術永久獲得+[effect0.upgrade.trigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][magicpower]。[consume]：效果加倍。
descriptionKey.korean: 사용 시 패에 있는 다른 주문들이 영원히 +[effect0.upgrade.trigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][magicpower]을 얻습니다. [consume]: 효과가 2배가 됩니다.
descriptionKey.japanese: 手札の他の呪文をプレイすると永続的に+[effect0.upgrade.trigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage] [magicpower]を得る。[consume]：効果が2倍になる。

upgradeDescriptionKey.english: When played, apply +[trigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage] [magicpower] to spells in hand permanently. [consume]: Double the effect.
upgradeDescriptionKey.french: Confère définitivement +[trigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage] [magicpower] aux sorts en main. <nobr>[consume] :</nobr> double l'effet.
upgradeDescriptionKey.german: Erhalte permanent +[trigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage] [magicpower] auf Zauber in der Hand, wenn diese Karte ausgespielt wird. [consume]: Effekt wird verdoppelt.
upgradeDescriptionKey.russian: При розыгрыше чарам в руке навсегда добавляется [magicpower] х[trigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage]. [consume] удваивает эффект.
upgradeDescriptionKey.portuguese: Quando jogada, concede +[trigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage] de [magicpower] aos feitiços em sua mão permanentemente. [consume]: dobra o efeito.
upgradeDescriptionKey.chinese: 打出后，使手牌中的所有法术永久获得 +[trigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage] [magicpower]。[consume]：使效果加倍。
upgradeDescriptionKey.spanish: Al jugarla, añade +[trigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage] [magicpower] a los hechizos de tu mano permanentemente. [consume]: Duplica el efecto.
upgradeDescriptionKey.chinese_traditional: 打出時，永久對手牌中的法術施加+[trigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][magicpower]。[consume]：效果加倍。
upgradeDescriptionKey.korean: 카드를 사용할 때, 패에 있는 주문 카드들에 영구적으로 +[trigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][magicpower]이 적용됩니다. [consume]: 효과를 2배로 적용합니다.
upgradeDescriptionKey.japanese: プレイ時、手札の呪文に+[trigger0.effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage] [magicpower]を永続的に付与する。[consume]：効果が2倍になる。

descriptionKey.english: Apply +[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage] [magicpower] to spells in hand permanently.
descriptionKey.french: Confère +[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][magicpower] aux sorts en main définitivement.
descriptionKey.german: Bewirkt permanent +[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage] [magicpower] auf Zauber auf deiner Hand.
descriptionKey.russian: Чарам в руке навсегда добавляется [magicpower] х[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage].
descriptionKey.portuguese: Concede +[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage] [magicpower] aos feitiços na mão permanentemente.
descriptionKey.chinese: 使手牌中的所有法术永久获得 +[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage] [magicpower]。
descriptionKey.spanish: Añade +[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage] [magicpower] a los hechizos de la mano permanentemente.
descriptionKey.korean: 패에 있는 주문 카드에 영구적으로 +[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][magicpower]이 적용됩니다.

descriptionKey.english: Defeat Lifemother while playing Luna Coven to upgrade.
descriptionKey.french: Battez Mère Nature en jouant les Lunariens pour améliorer.
descriptionKey.german: Besiege für eine Verbesserung die Lebensmutter, während du mit dem Luna-Zirkel spielst.
descriptionKey.russian: Чтобы улучшить, победите Мать-природу, играя за Лунный ковен.
descriptionKey.portuguese: Derrote a Genetriz jogando com a Irmandade Lunar para melhorar.
descriptionKey.chinese: 用月巫团击败生命之母以升级。
descriptionKey.spanish: Derrota a la Madre Vida con el Aquelarre de Selene para mejorar.
descriptionKey.chinese_traditional: 遊玩月之女巫時擊敗生命之母以升級。
descriptionKey.korean: 달 집회 플레이 중 생명의 어머니를 처치하면 업그레이드됩니다.
descriptionKey.japanese: 月魔族でのプレイでライフマザーを倒してアップグレード。
